contacts.title: Get in Touch
contacts.description: Multiple ways to reach us - choose what works best for you

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Everything you need to know about our home nursing services

q1.question: How can I book a nurse?
q1.answer: You can book a nurse through several methods: by filling out the online booking form, calling us at +420 773 629 123, via email at info@nius.cz, or through WhatsApp/Telegram. After booking, we will contact you to confirm the appointment time.

q2.question: How quickly can a nurse arrive?
q2.answer: We strive to provide care as quickly as possible. Depending on your location in Prague and current nurse availability, we can typically arrive within 2-3 hours of confirming your booking. For planned visits, we recommend booking a nurse at least one day in advance.

q3.question: Do you visit hotels and Airbnb accommodations?
q3.answer: Yes! We regularly visit international patients staying in hotels, Airbnb, and short-term rentals throughout Prague. This is especially common for IVF patients and medical tourists needing post-surgery care. Just provide your accommodation address when booking.

q4.question: Do you work with IVF patients and fertility clinics?
q4.answer: Absolutely. We have extensive experience with IVF patients, including time-sensitive hormone injections and trigger shots. We're familiar with protocols from major Prague fertility clinics like Reprofit, ISCARE, and Gennet. We offer evening and weekend appointments for precise timing requirements.

q5.question: Can you help with post-surgery recovery for medical tourists?
q5.answer: Yes, this is one of our specialties. We provide wound care, bandage changes, drain management, hygiene assistance, and escort services for patients recovering from plastic surgery, dental procedures, or other medical treatments in Prague. We understand the unique needs of international patients.

q6.question: Do I need a medical prescription for IV therapy?
q6.answer: Yes, prescribed IV therapies require a medical prescription. Our nurses can only administer medications prescribed by a doctor. If you're interested in vitamin or hydration IVs, these can be administered without a prescription as they are considered dietary supplements.

q7.question: What payment methods do you accept?
q7.answer: We accept cash (CZK or EUR), bank transfers, and card payments. Payment is collected after service. For package deals and subscription services, we can invoice monthly. Most insurance companies do not cover home nursing, but we provide receipts for potential reimbursement.

q8.question: Do you provide services outside of Prague?
q8.answer: We primarily operate in Prague, but we can provide services in the surrounding areas (up to 30 km) by individual arrangement. For travel outside Prague, we charge an additional fee of 10 CZK/km above the base rate.

q9.question: What are your operating hours?
q9.answer: We are available 7 days a week from 8:00 AM to 10:00 PM. For urgent cases and IVF injections requiring specific timing, we also offer evening/night visits by arrangement. Call +420 773 629 123 anytime for 24/7 booking.

q10.question: Do you offer long-term care for disabled patients?
q10.answer: Yes, we provide daily assistance care for disabled and chronic patients, including hygiene support, medication administration, mobility assistance, and companionship. We offer flexible subscription packages for ongoing care needs.

q11.question: Are your services covered by insurance?
q11.answer: Currently, our services are not covered by health insurance. This is a direct payment by the client. Upon request, we will issue a receipt for payment that you can use for possible claims with your insurance company if you have additional insurance for premium healthcare.

q12.question: Do I need to prepare anything before the nurse arrives?
q12.answer: For the smoothest possible visit, we recommend: having your medical prescription ready (if required), ensuring a calm and clean space for the procedure, informing us in advance about your health condition and any allergies, and having your doctor's contact information handy.

faq.title: IVF Support in Prague — Frequently Asked Questions

items.question: What is Intralipid infusion and why is it used in IVF?
items.answer: Intralipid is an intravenous fat emulsion used to suppress elevated Natural Killer (NK) cells in the uterus. Some fertility specialists in Prague prescribe Intralipid infusions before embryo transfer to improve implantation rates. Our nurses are experienced in administering Intralipid therapy at your hotel or home in Prague, following your clinic's protocol.

items.question: What is NK cell treatment for fertility?
items.answer: NK (Natural Killer) cell treatment aims to reduce overactive immune cells that may attack an implanting embryo. The most common treatment is Intralipid infusion, which is administered intravenously. Prague fertility clinics like Reprofit and ISCARE may prescribe NK cell testing and subsequent Intralipid therapy as part of your IVF protocol. We administer these infusions at your location in Prague.

items.question: Why is injection timing critical during IVF?
items.answer: IVF medications must be administered at precise times to synchronize follicle growth and ovulation. Even a 30-minute deviation can affect your cycle. Trigger shots (Ovitrelle, Decapeptyl) are particularly time-sensitive, often prescribed at unusual hours. Our nurses guarantee on-time arrival for every injection.

items.question: Can you come at 5 AM for a trigger shot?
items.answer: Yes! We offer 24/7 availability specifically because IVF timing demands it. Whether your trigger shot is at 5 AM, 11 PM, or any other time, our nurse will be at your door on time. We've done thousands of early-morning and late-night IVF visits.

items.question: Do you work with Prague IVF clinics like Reprofit, ISCARE, Gennet?
items.answer: Yes. We regularly support patients from Reprofit, ISCARE, Gennet, Pronatal, and other Prague fertility clinics. We're familiar with their standard protocols for stimulation, trigger shots, and Intralipid therapy. We can coordinate directly with your clinic if needed.

items.question: What fertility medications can you administer?
items.answer: We administer all common IVF medications: Gonal-F, Menopur, Cetrotide, Orgalutran, Decapeptyl, Ovitrelle (trigger shots), progesterone in oil (intramuscular), Clexane, and more. Both subcutaneous and intramuscular injections. We verify medication, dosage, and timing before every administration.

items.question: What IVF support services do you offer in Prague?
items.answer: We offer three core IVF support services: (1) Medication administration — all fertility injections including stimulation drugs and trigger shots; (2) Intralipid infusions — IV therapy for NK cell suppression before embryo transfer; (3) Wellness IV drips — Glutathione, NAD+, and Vitamin C drips to support your body during IVF. All services are available at your hotel, Airbnb, or home in Prague.

items.question: How much do IVF injections cost in Prague?
items.answer: A single IVF injection visit costs 1,890 CZK, which includes the nurse visit, all sterile supplies, sharps disposal, and travel anywhere in Prague. For multiple injections during your cycle, we offer a 10% discount (1,700 CZK per visit). Intralipid infusions are quoted individually based on your clinic's protocol. Contact us for a personalized quote.

items.question: Can you administer Glutathione or NAD+ IV drips during IVF?
items.answer: Yes! Many IVF patients add wellness IV drips to support their cycle. Glutathione is popular for its antioxidant properties and potential egg quality benefits. NAD+ supports cellular energy. Vitamin C boosts immunity. These can be combined with your injection visit for convenience. See our full IV drip menu for options and pricing.

items.question: What if I'm staying at a hotel?
items.answer: Hotel visits are our specialty! We serve all Prague hotels, Airbnb apartments, and short-term rentals. Simply provide your hotel name, room number, and preferred time. The nurse arrives discreetly with all necessary supplies. No need to leave your room or arrange transport to a clinic.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Can I have the same nurse each visit?
faq.a1: Yes! With our monthly subscription, we assign a consistent caregiver who gets to know your needs and preferences. This creates continuity and comfort.
faq.q2: What if I need help with intimate care?
faq.a2: Our nurses are professionally trained in all aspects of personal care, including bathing, toileting, suppository insertion, and catheter care. We provide dignified, respectful assistance.
faq.a3: Yes! All our nurses speak English, which is especially important for expats and foreigners without Czech language skills or family support in Prague.
faq.q4: Can I adjust my monthly hours?
faq.a4: Absolutely. Monthly subscriptions are flexible. If you need more or fewer hours, we can adjust your plan. Unused hours can roll over or be credited.
faq.q5: What areas of Prague do you serve?
faq.a5: We serve all Prague districts and surrounding areas up to 30km from city center. Travel is included in all pricing.

q1.question: Is the Glow IV Drip a real medical treatment?
q1.answer: Yes. The Glow & Post-Flu IV drip is a professional IV infusion administered by a registered nurse. It contains medically-approved microelements, trace vitamins, and immune support nutrients. All treatments follow strict medical protocols.

q2.question: How does the Women's Day gift voucher work?
q2.answer: After you place your order, we send you a digital gift voucher with a unique code. You forward it to the recipient. She contacts us to book her preferred date, time, and location in Prague. It's that simple.

q3.question: Can I book for March 8 specifically?
q3.answer: Absolutely. You can either pre-book for March 8 or purchase an open voucher she can redeem anytime within 3 months.

q4.question: Is the IV drip safe?
q4.answer: Completely. All treatments are administered by certified registered nurses using sterile, single-use medical equipment. We conduct a brief health screening before every session.

q5.question: What if she's never had an IV before?
q5.answer: No problem! Our nurses are experienced and gentle. The procedure is very comfortable and takes about 60 minutes while she can relax, read, or watch something.

q6.question: Can the voucher be used after March 8?
q6.answer: Yes, the voucher is valid for 3 months from the date of purchase. She can use it whenever it's convenient for her.

q7.question: Do you deliver to hotels and Airbnbs?
q7.answer: Yes! We serve all Prague districts including hotels, Airbnbs, private homes, and offices. The nurse brings all necessary equipment.

q1.question: Is the Glow IV Drip a real medical treatment?
q1.answer: Yes. The Glow & Post-Flu IV drip is a professional IV infusion administered by a registered nurse. It contains medically-approved microelements, trace vitamins, and immune support nutrients. All treatments follow strict medical protocols.

q2.question: How does the birthday gift voucher work?
q2.answer: After you place your order, we send you a digital gift voucher with a unique code and your personal birthday message. You forward it to the recipient. She contacts us to book her preferred date, time, and location in Prague. It's that simple.

q3.question: Can I book for a specific birthday date?
q3.answer: Absolutely. You can either pre-book for the exact birthday date or purchase an open voucher she can redeem anytime within 3 months.

q4.question: Is the IV drip safe?
q4.answer: Completely. All treatments are administered by certified registered nurses using sterile, single-use medical equipment. We conduct a brief health screening before every session.

q5.question: What if she's never had an IV before?
q5.answer: No problem! Our nurses are experienced and gentle. The procedure is very comfortable and takes about 60 minutes while she can relax, read, or watch something.

q6.question: Can I add extras to the birthday gift?
q6.answer: The Glow IV Drip is a complete experience on its own, but we can coordinate with local flower delivery or champagne services to make it even more special. Just ask when ordering.

q7.question: Do you deliver to hotels and Airbnbs?
q7.answer: Yes! We serve all Prague districts including hotels, Airbnbs, private homes, and offices. The nurse brings all necessary equipment.

howItWorks.title: How Our IV Drip Service Works in Prague
howItWorks.subtitle: From booking to aftercare — here's what to expect with NIUS mobile IV therapy

step1.title: Contact Us & Choose Your IV Drip
step1.description: Call {{phone}} or message us on WhatsApp. Tell us your location (hotel name, address in Prague), symptoms, and goals. We'll recommend the best IV drip and confirm same-day availability.

step2.title: Quick Health Screening
step2.description: We'll ask basic health questions (allergies, current medications, medical history). This ensures your IV drip in Prague is safe and appropriate for your situation. Doctor consultation arranged if needed (additional 900 CZK).

step3.title: Registered Nurse Arrives at Your Location
step3.description: Our nurse comes to your hotel, home, or Airbnb in Prague with all sterile equipment, IV supplies, and emergency kit. Typical arrival time: 1–3 hours for same-day bookings, or schedule in advance for exact timing.

step4.title: 45–60 Minute IV Therapy Session
step4.description: Relax during your IV drip. The nurse will insert the IV line, start the infusion, and monitor you throughout. Most sessions take 45–60 minutes. Feel free to read, work, or rest during treatment.

step5.title: Aftercare Guidance & Payment
step5.description: After your IV drip, the nurse provides aftercare instructions and answers questions. Payment via cash, card, or bank transfer. We'll follow up if you have any concerns.
step5.tip: Tip: Stay hydrated and avoid alcohol for 24 hours after IV therapy for best results.

preparation.title: Preparing for Your IV Drip in Prague

before.title: Before Your Session
items: Eat a light meal 1–2 hours before
Drink water to stay hydrated
Wear comfortable clothing with loose sleeves
Have your medication list ready (if applicable)
Ensure nurse can access your location easily

after.title: After Your Session
items: Rest for 15–30 minutes before activities
Drink plenty of water (2–3 liters over 24 hours)
Avoid alcohol for 24 hours
Light exercise is fine; avoid intense workouts same day
Contact us if you have any concerns or questions

contraindications.title: Contraindications & Safety
contraindications.description: IV drips may not be suitable if you have:
items: Severe kidney or heart disease (without medical approval)
Known allergies to IV components
Uncontrolled high blood pressure
Active cancer treatment (consult your oncologist first)
contraindications.note: Important: Always disclose your full medical history during screening. Our nurses will assess suitability before proceeding.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions About IV Drips in Prague
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about mobile IV therapy in Prague

safe.question: Are IV drips safe?
safe.answer: Yes, when administered by trained medical professionals. All our IV drips in Prague are performed by registered nurses using sterile equipment and medical-grade protocols. We screen all patients before treatment and monitor throughout the session.

duration.question: How long does an IV drip take in Prague?
duration.answer: Most IV drip sessions take 45–60 minutes including setup, infusion, and monitoring. Complex formulas (like MEGA Recovery) may take up to 75 minutes. Same-day bookings available.

hotels.question: Do you come to hotels in Prague?
hotels.answer: Absolutely! We provide mobile IV drips at hotels, Airbnbs, private homes, and offices throughout Prague. Popular hotels: Four Seasons, Mandarin Oriental, Hilton, any hotel in Prague 1, Vinohrady, Old Town, and beyond.

hangover.question: What's the best IV drip for hangovers?
hangover.answer: For hangovers, try our Nausea Relief (2,850 CZK) for immediate symptom relief, or Electrolyte Reset (2,950 CZK) with 2000mg Magnesium for hydration and muscle recovery. Pure Hydrate (2,450 CZK) is also effective for rapid rehydration.

vitaminC.question: Can I get Vitamin C IV drips in Prague?
vitaminC.answer: Yes! We offer three levels: Immunity Lite (2,800 CZK) for baseline support, Immunity Power (3,150 CZK) with 15g high-dose Vitamin C, and Defense Shield Hero (4,250 CZK) for ultimate flu & virus recovery.

iron.question: Do you offer iron infusions in Prague?
iron.answer: Yes, we offer Standard Iron with Ferrlecit (2,750 CZK) for gentle iron replenishment and Premium Iron with Ferinject (6,350 CZK) for high-potency treatment of chronic fatigue and severe anemia.

cost.question: How much do IV drips cost in Prague?
cost.answer: Prices range from 1,550 CZK to 6,350 CZK (€60–€250) depending on the treatment. Most popular IV drips are 2,450–4,450 CZK. All prices include nurse visit, equipment, and monitoring. 10% discount on packages of 2+ visits.

sameDay.question: Can I get same-day IV drips in Prague?
sameDay.answer: Yes! We offer same-day IV drip service in Prague with typical arrival within 1–3 hours. Available daily 8 AM – 8 PM including weekends and holidays. Book in advance for exact scheduling.

districts.question: Which Prague districts do you serve?
districts.answer: We serve all Prague districts: Prague 1, Prague 2, Vinohrady, Žižkov, Old Town, New Town, Karlín, Holešovice, and surrounding areas within 20km of city center.

prescription.question: Do I need a prescription for IV drips?
prescription.answer: Some IV formulas require a doctor's prescription or consultation (additional 900 CZK if needed). We'll assess during health screening and arrange if necessary. Many formulas don't require prescription.
